model.setDefaultSuccessMsg: Global default model has been set to {{modelName}}
model.setDefaultFailedMsg: Failed to update default model configuration in the database
model.setSummaryFollowMsg: Topic summary model has been set to follow system default
model.setSummaryModelMsg: Topic summary model has been set to {{modelName}}
model.setSummaryFailedMsg: Failed to update summary model configuration in the database
model.defaultModelTooltip: Global default LLM. New conversations will use this by default unless changed manually.
model.noModelsEnabledPlaceholder: Please enable at least one model below first
model.summaryModelTooltip: Used to summarize the conversation topic in the background after the first message. Cost-effective models are recommended.
model.activateProviderTooltip: Please complete provider connection test to activate

provider.testModelPlaceholder: Model name for connectivity test (e.g., glm-4-flash)

sandbox.title: Cloud Sandbox Settings
sandbox.enableTooltip: When enabled, code execution and browser tools will run inside secure Daytona cloud sandboxes, shielding your host system from any malicious code.
sandbox.apiUrlTooltip: Enter the base service URL of Daytona (e.g., https://app.daytona.io). Please DO NOT append /api at the end, the system formats the requests automatically.
sandbox.apiKeyPlaceholder: Enter API token starting with dtn_
sandbox.testOkMsg: Successfully connected to Daytona Cloud Sandbox!
sandbox.testMissingFields: Please fill in API URL and API Key before proceeding.
sandbox.saveSuccessMsg: Cloud sandbox settings have been updated
sandbox.saveFailedMsg: Failed to update sandbox configuration in database
sandbox.snapshotTooltip: Specify an existing Daytona Snapshot name (pre-installed with Playwright etc.). Future sandboxes will use this snapshot directly, no repeated installs needed. Leave empty to use Daytona's default image.
sandbox.snapshotHint: When using the Browser tool for the first time, the default Daytona image needs to install ~300MB of Playwright dependencies. You can enter a new name above to create a pre-built snapshot, or choose an existing snapshot template from the list below (click the star icon to set as default and reuse it instantly, without recreating it).
sandbox.snapshotDoneMsg: Snapshot '{{name}}' is ready. Future sandboxes will use it automatically — Browser tool is now instant!
sandbox.disableSuccessMsg: Daytona sandbox tools have been disabled. Run the connectivity test again to re-enable.
sandbox.retestHint: Sandbox is disabled. Run the connection test again to re-enable.
